author.name: ISMIR 2026 Scientific Program and Publications Team

description: Official LaTeX template for the International Society for Music Information Retrieval Conference (ISMIR) 2026. Provides double-blind submission support with automatic line numbering and author anonymization toggled via a single package option, one/two/three/multi-author title blocks, a branded first-page copyright/license notice, IEEE-style numbered citations, and dedicated AI Usage and Ethics Statement sections, based on a custom ismir document class.
